text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both treading water with minor losses, while altcoins like Solana and BNB are showing sharper declines, suggesting risk-off rotation toward the majors. The Fear & Greed index at 18 signals extreme fear that has intensified over the past week, though $43 billion in daily volume remains respectable and Bitcoin's dominance near 56% indicates some confidence in the larger narrative despite the downturn. The overall picture points to a cautious, sentiment-driven market where traders are de-risking into safer assets rather than exiting entirely.
